titleStmt.title: SII 16.197: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 197. (A.R. No. 368 of 1920.) CHITRACHĒḌU, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab in the compound of the mosque.
This is dated Śaka 1477 (current), Ānanda, Bhādrapada śu. 15, corresponding to 1554 A.D., September 11.

It records a gift of income derived from doṁbari-pannu collected from the Kāpus of Chitrachēḍu, to the gods Chennakēśava, Rāmayaliṅga and Gaṇādhipati for worship during the dhanurmāsa and another occasion, by the dommaris Jannavula Gaṅgarāju, Jumāna-khānu and Dhaḷādhūḷi. The village Chitrachēḍu is said to have been given as nāyaṅkara to Komāra Koṇḍrājaya by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Yaratimmayadēva-mahārāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1477 Agunē
ṭi Ānaṁda saṁvatsara bhādrapada śu 15 lu śrīmaṁnma
hārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu
vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuḍai pṛdhvirājyaṁ cēyucuṁ
ḍagānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēsvara rāmarāju
yaradiṁmayyadēvamahārājulu komāra koṁ
ḍrājayavāri nāyaṁkrānaku pāliṁci Icina
citracēḍigrāmānanu doṁbari jaṁnavula gaṁgarā
ju jumānakhānuḍu dhaḷādhūḷi I mūḍu vīḷavā
ruṁnnu citracēḍi ceṁnna kēśavunikiṁni rāmaya
liṁgānaku gaṇādhipatiki dhanurmāsa pūjaku
vaṁ pūja naḍacekoraku tama svajātiyya va
yiruvayinālugu vīḷakulaṁvāriki pu
ṇyaṁ AyyēAṭugānu citracēḍi kāpu
lu yiccē doṁbari paṁnu cennakēśvaru
niki rāmēśvaruniki gaṇādhipatiki sārva
kālamuṁkānu naḍapeAṭugānu tamaku
laṁ yiruvayinālugukulālavāriki pu
ṇyaṁgānu dhāravōśi yicina janeUla
gaṁgarāju jumānakānuḍu thaḷādhūḷi
yi mūḍu vīḷavāruṁnnu tamakulaṁ vā
riki puṁṇyaṁgānu Āceṁdrārkastāyi
gānu putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁ
gānu timmarājulku puṇyaṁgānu dhāra
vōsi yistimi yī dānānaku ganka yavure
tama yiruvainālugu kulālalōna va
tappi Āḍipāḍinaṁ nātaḍē pāpakamu
tama yiruvainālugukulālaku velibeṭṭi
navāṁḍlu tama Iḷavāri gāḍidi viṣaṇālu
nu kukkamāṁsamuṁnu sura sēviṁcinavāru
dēśālaku veli Ani Icina dharma
śāsanaṁ maṁgaḷamahā śrī
Digital edition of SII 16.197 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
